description: SourceFlowConfig schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorType.description: The type of connector used as a source.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the connector used in the source.

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile. Required for all connectors except Amplitude, Datadog, Dynatrace, GoogleAnalytics, Marketo, SAPOData, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Singular, Slack, Trendmicro, and Veeva.

sourceConnectorProperties.description: Specifies the information that is required to query a particular source connector.

incrementalPullConfig.description: Defines the configuration for a scheduled incremental data pull. If a valid configuration is provided, the fields specified in the configuration are used when querying for the incremental data pull.

datetimeTypeFieldName.description: A field that specifies the date time or timestamp field as the criteria to use when importing incremental records from the source.
